description: Analyze multi-stage processes (assign → start → complete → certify) with conversion rates and dropout analysis between stages.

transformations: define stage sequence (assign → enroll → start → complete → certify)
optional: segment by org_unit or training_type

cce_config.uses: transition weights between funnel stages — if available, weight dropout causes

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer metrics that map to discrete funnel stages; deprioritize metrics that are aggregate-only with no stage breakdown
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric should include funnel_stage (which stage it measures) and stage_order (1..N); include conversion_rate computation between adjacent stages
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: optional — if causal edges connect funnel stage metrics, use them to weight dropout cause analysis

penalty_rules: penalize metrics that cannot be mapped to a funnel stage (-0.15)
penalize aggregate metrics with no stage-level breakdown (-0.10)
boost_rules: boost metrics that directly measure a funnel stage count (+0.10)
boost metrics at the largest-dropout stage (+0.08)
boost metrics with time-series for trend overlay on funnel (+0.05)
